notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena singles on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Jacob Young scores.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. José Tena scores. James Wood to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Curtis Mead steals (2) 2nd base. James Wood steals (2) home.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead lines out to second baseman Brice Turang.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez pops out to catcher Drew Millas in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Jake Bauers batting, Garrett Mitchell picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Jacob Young to 3rd. Jacob Young advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras scores.

notableEvents.label: Luis Rengifo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo flies out to left fielder Daylen Lile.
